7335164464.label: 📰 Agrithm Farming News 📅 April ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎓 Training Zero Budget Natural Farming: Training Camp In Tirupati The Ap Natural Farming Mission Is Conducting A Free Residential Training Zero Budget Natural Farming (Zbnf) Tirupati From Next Monday. Topics Include Jeevamrutha Preparation, Seed Treatment, And Mulching Techniques. Register Apzbnf.Ap.Gov.In. 💧 Irrigation Scheme Drip Irrigation Subsidy: Sc/St Farmers In Ap Andhra Pradesh Government Offers Up To Subsidy Drip Irrigation Systems Sc/St Farmers And Other Small Farmers. Applications Open Horticulture.Ap.Gov.In. Last Date This Season Is End Of This Month. Water Use Can Be Reduced By With Drip. 🏛️ Government Policy Msp Paddy Increased By ₹143 Per Quintal The Cabinet Committee Economic Affairs Has Approved A Hike In The Minimum Support Price (Msp) Kharif Paddy To ₹2,183 Per Quintal. Farmers Are Advised To Register Their Nearest Apmc To Benefit From Government Procurement This Season. 📈 Market Update Black Pepper Prices Hit High Wayanad Mandi Black Pepper Prices Have Reached ₹620 Per Kg Wayanad Mandi, The Highest In Five Years, Driven By Reduced Production In Vietnam And Strong Domestic Demand. Kerala Farmers Are Advised To Hold Stock More Weeks Maximum Benefit. 🌍 Local Event Free Soil Health Card Camp In Nellore District Next Week The Andhra Pradesh Agriculture Department Will Conduct A Free Soil Health Card (Shc) Camp In Nellore District From Monday To Friday. Farmers Can Bring Soil Samples From Their Field Corners Free Npk And Micronutrient Testing. Cards Will Be Distributed Within Days. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Tap '⏰ Alarm' To Schedule Your News Digest.
